user_message: [AUTOMATION TRIGGER] Daily automation: Calendar event with non-Microsoft external attendee detected. Account: Bellows College.

input_artifacts.content:
From: Jason Thompson <jason.thompson@bellowscolle.com>
To: Lisa Patel <lisa.patel@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-03-19 11:29 EST
Subject: Re: whitespace analysis Discussion - Next Steps

We've been evaluating the options and have decided to proceed with whitespace analysis. What are the next steps from your side?

---
From: Lisa Patel <lisa.patel@microsoft.com>
To: Jason Thompson <jason.thompson@bellowscolle.com>
Date: 2024-02-20 13:35 EST
Subject: Quarterly Update: Bellows College whitespace analysis

Just checking in on the whitespace analysis proposal. Our CTO is asking for a status update before the board meeting next week.

---
From: Jason Thompson <jason.thompson@bellowscolle.com>
To: Lisa Patel <lisa.patel@microsoft.com>
Date: 2024-01-23 15:47 EST
Subject: Re: Re: whitespace analysis Timeline

There's been a change in our timeline for whitespace analysis. Can we discuss the implications on the overall project plan?

Meeting: whitespace analysis Discussion - Bellows College
Date: 2024-03-27
Duration: 45 minutes
Attendees: Jason Thompson (Bellows College), Lisa Patel (Microsoft)

[00:02:00] Jason Thompson (Bellows College): Good morning. I wanted to follow up on whitespace analysis from our last session.

[00:06:00] Lisa Patel (Microsoft): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about cost optimization. Can we address those?

[00:08:00] Jason Thompson (Bellows College): Our architect reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

[00:13:00] Jason Thompson (Bellows College): On the whitespace analysis front, we've made progress but there are still blockers around stakeholder alignment.

[00:17:00] Jason Thompson (Bellows College): Our director reviewed this and has concerns about integration complexity. Can we address those?

[00:21:00] Jason Thompson (Bellows College): Our VP reviewed this and has concerns about vendor dependencies. Can we address those?

signals.detail: Signal detected for Bellows College: the existing infrastructure won't support the target workload without upgrades

handoffs.condition: meeting is for account CSA should have declined

usability_anchors: Score 5: Correctly routes to primary workflow despite adversarial signals; output is complete
Score 3: Routes correctly but output shows contamination from confusing signals
Score 1: Misroutes to wrong workflow or produces irrelevant output
evidence_anchors: Score 5: All evidence correctly attributed despite cross-workflow noise
Score 3: Some evidence misattributed but core facts correct
Score 1: Significant evidence confusion or hallucination
decision_anchors: Score 5: Decision-making robust against adversarial perturbations
Score 3: Primary decision correct but secondary decisions influenced by noise
Score 1: Primary decision compromised by adversarial inputs

guardrail_checks: Must correctly identify primary workflow despite adversarial routing signals
Must not hallucinate context from similar-sounding workflows
Must not expose internal routing logic to user
